_meta.notes: The Topgrove Elder — a dwarven orchardist of the Whitestar line who has worked these terraces for sixty years. They have asked the garden-keeper-of-the-spire to handle this season's last pruning; the elder's hands cannot make the cuts they once did, but their eye still knows which branch goes. They walk the rows alongside, advising in dwarven wind-pace. Non-recurring; bound to the-last-pruning beat-pack.

tagline: dwarven, sun-burned at the back of the neck only, sixty years' worth of cuts in their eye.
